General.Name: Platt Nera International Ltd
General.Description: Platt Nera International Limited, an investment holding company, provides IT solutions and services to financial institutions, government departments, and agencies primarily in administrative, telecommunications, and utilities sectors in Thailand. Its IT integrated solutions include IT system design and planning, assessment of hardware and/or software options, sourcing and sale of hardware and/or software, system installation and integration, and launch to trial operation, as well as system upgrades for existing IT systems. The company also provides operational, support, upgrade, and maintenance services to IT system; and sells equipment. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. Platt Nera International Limited is a subsidiary of Pynk Holding Limited.
